void.$description: Void — Page canvas — the near-black ground on which everything floats

midnight-surface.$description: Midnight Surface — Elevated message cards and content surfaces — a slightly bluer lift off the Void

halo.$description: Halo — Primary text, heading strokes, and reverse-mode accents

hairline.$description: Hairline — Hairline borders, dividers, and card outlines — 1px strokes that architect the void

tiktok-sans-variable.$description: Headlines (32px) and body copy (24px) — the only voice on the page. Slight positive tracking (0.0150em) and the cv04 alternate glyph set soften the geometric grotesque into something more human. Variable weight axis available for whisper-to-emphasis range.

system-ui-sans-serif.$description: Micro-labels, nav chrome, and small supporting text. 12px is the floor — nothing smaller.

void.$description: Surface level 0: Page canvas — the deep-space ground

midnight-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Elevated card surface carrying the primary message

halo.$description: Surface level 2: Reverse text and highlight moments
